texto: The moment will arrive when you are comfortable with who you are, and what you are– bald or old or fat or poor, successful or struggling- when you don't feel the need to apologize for anything or to deny anything. To be comfortable in your own skin is the beginning of strength.
explicacao: Citação de Charles B. Handy sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The moment will arrive when you are comfortable with who you are, and what you are– bald or old o…” articula sucesso, comfortable, handy em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como handy e strength.

frase_original: The moment will arrive when you are comfortable with who you are, and what you are– bald or old or fat or poor, successful or struggling- when you don't feel the need to apologize for anything or to deny anything. To be comfortable in your own skin is the beginning of strength.
